$schema_note: Phase 5 M3 semantic-repetition golden set. Each case posts a draft to /v1/analyze-draft with include_semantic_repetition=true and asserts that an insight whose evidence.lemmas contains at least one of expected_lemmas is returned.

cases.name: listening_image_reuse
cases.content:
I hear your shadow in the hall
I hear your footsteps on the floor
cases.notes: Both lines anchor on the verb 'hear' with image variations; should cluster.

cases.name: running_lemma_family
cases.content:
She was running through the rain
She is running beneath the storm
She runs into the night
cases.notes: Lemma family running/runs should collapse via simplemma into 'run'.
